ddls:
CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "skill_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the skill is acquired or can be used */,
  "attribute" TEXT /* Attribute associated with the skill (e.g., Fire, Neutral) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of skill (e.g., Physical, Support) */,
  "sp_cost" INTEGER /* SP (Skill Point) cost to use the skill */,
  "power" INTEGER /* Power or effectiveness of the skill */,
  "skill_type" TEXT /* Type of skill (e.g., Special Move, Inherited Skill) */,
  "cooldown" REAL /* Time required to use the skill again after it has been used */,
  "cast_time" REAL /* Time required to cast the skill */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Effective range of the skill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES skill_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_attribute FOREIGN KEY ("attribute") REFERENCES skill_attributes ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the character */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the character */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the character */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Maximum health points of the character */,
  "mana" INTEGER /* Maximum mana points of the character */,
  "agility" INTEGER /* Agility of the character */,
  "intelligence" INTEGER /* Intelligence of the character */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_skills" (
  "character_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between character and skill */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "skill_level" INTEGER /* Level of the skill for the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_skills_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_skills_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect of the attribute on skills */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the skill type (e.g., melee, ranged, magic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill usage event */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character using the skill */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the skill was used */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of using the skill (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Damage dealt by the skill */,
  "xp_gained" INTEGER /* Experience points gained from using the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_usage_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_usage_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for completing the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_skills" (
  "event_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between event and skill */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "required_level" INTEGER /* Required level to participate in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_skills_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_skills_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_balancing" (
  "balancing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balancing event */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill being balanced */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were implemented */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the game when the changes were made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balancing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_balancing_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the player (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment from the player */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_reviews_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect the item has on skills */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "level_requirement" INTEGER /* Required level to equip the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_skills" (
  "item_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between item and skill */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the item's effect on the skill (e.g., 1.2 for a 20% increase) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_skills_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_skills_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patches" (
  "patch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patch */,
  "patch_name" TEXT /* Name of the patch */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the patch */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the patch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patch_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "patch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patch */,
  "note" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the change (e.g., balance, bug fix, feature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patch_notes_patch_id FOREIGN KEY ("patch_id") REFERENCES patches ("patch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
